name: Conservatory of Flowers
summary_en: The archive record is dominated by Recreation and Park Commission minutes from 1979 through 1991 that track the Conservatory of Flowers — the long-awaited construction, donations of plants and orchids, interim building repairs, and an accepted $43,000 gift for the Conservatory Auxiliary. Late-1990s Parks and Recreation Committee minutes discuss renovation of the building, and 'What's doing in the parks' bulletins list it among Golden Gate Park attractions. The Conservatory is operated by the Recreation and Park Department, whose FY2025 budget line is about $250M. No contract in the data names it.

documents.title: Meeting minutes
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Board of Supervisors. Parks and Recreation Committee
